creator: clefevre@citeweb.net
text:
"Kari E. Hurtta" <Kari.Hurtta@ozone.fmi.fi> writes:
 
 > Cyrille Lefevre:
 > > +# here is the main repository, but the .tar.gz isn't available right now,
 > > +# there is only a .tar archive!
 > 
 > I have fixed that.
 
 thanks.
 
 > hurtta@ozone:~> ls -la ~ftp/KEH/elm-2.4ME+87.tar.gz
 > -r--r--r--    3 hurtta   nog       940427 Dec 29 21:58 /data/ftp/KEH/elm-2.4ME+87.tar.gz
 > hurtta@ozone:~>
 
 it looks (very) much smaller right now :)
 
 to the FreeBSD team, I'll submit a patch concerning about that.
 
 Cyrille.
